products.name: Modern Sectional Sofa
products.description: Transform your living room with this luxurious L-shaped sectional sofa. Upholstered in premium fabric with high-density foam cushions for lasting comfort. Features a chaise lounge and USB charging ports built into the armrest.

products.name: Professional Microphone Stand
products.description: Heavy-duty boom arm microphone stand built for studio and live performance. Adjustable height from 35" to 65", aircraft-grade aluminum construction, anti-vibration base, and universal mic clip included.

products.name: Ergonomic Mesh Office Chair
products.description: Engineered for all-day comfort, this award-winning ergonomic chair features a breathable mesh backrest, 6-way adjustable lumbar support, 4D armrests, and a synchronized tilt mechanism. Certified for 8+ hours of use.

products.name: Solid Oak Coffee Table
products.description: Handcrafted from sustainably sourced solid oak with a natural walnut finish. Features a lower storage shelf and hairpin legs for a mid-century modern aesthetic. Each piece is uniquely grained — no two tables are the same.

products.name: Wooden Coffee Table
products.description: A beautiful centerpiece coffee table with a rustic finish.
